name: AK-47 Assault Rifle
prompt:
Vietnam War era Soviet AK-47 (Type 56 Chinese copy used by NVA/VC). The ubiquitous enemy weapon.

Physical structure (~0.87m total length):
- Receiver: stamped steel with distinctive ribbed dust cover on top
- Barrel: with front sight post (hooded), slanted muzzle brake/compensator
- Gas tube: visible above barrel, cylindrical, between front sight and rear sight
- Handguard: laminated wood (reddish-brown), upper and lower
- Pistol grip: wood, angled
- Stock: solid wood buttstock with steel buttplate, slightly curved
- Magazine: iconic curved 30-round banana magazine, dark steel
- Rear sight: tangent leaf sight on rear of receiver
- Charging handle: right side of bolt carrier
- Cleaning rod: thin rod under barrel (can simplify)

Colors: Blued steel (0x2d2d35), reddish-brown wood (0x8B4513), dark magazine (0x333333)
Orientation: Lying flat, barrel pointing along +Z axis, right side up
Scale: Real-world meters (total length ~0.87m)
animations: No animation needed for weapon prop
